response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the song '無敵☆本気だサバイバー!' (Muteki☆Honki da Survivor!) and the performer 'Yukihana Lamy' from on-screen text and audio context. 
2. Performed a search for the lyrics of the song using the query: "無敵★本気だサバイバー 雪花ラミィ 歌詞 lyrics".
3. Found multiple sources (e.g., Uta-net, Genius) confirming the song title, artist, and lyrics. The composer is Ishida Hideto.
4. Mapped the song to the two scenes in the video where it occurs (performance and music video segments).
5. Populated the scene descriptions and lyric fields.
response.global_summary: A 3D live performance of the song "Muteki☆Honki da Survivor!" by Hololive VTuber Yukihana Lamy, followed by an animated music video sequence and an outro.

scenes.description: Yukihana Lamy performs the song 'Muteki☆Honki da Survivor!' on a stage with backup dancers. The song title and performance credits are implied by the context of the 'Hololive Birthday 3D Hero Show'.
scenes.song_title: 無敵☆本気だサバイバー!
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ギリギリの 綱渡り
弱音はポケットの奥 しまい込んだら
ただ進むだけ
こけたって 即リスタート
そこからがスタートライン
もう止まらないよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Barely making it, walking a tightrope
Once I tuck my complaints deep into my pocket
I'll just keep moving forward
Even if I stumble, it's an immediate restart
That's the starting line from there
I won't stop anymore

scenes.description: Lamy speaks to the audience and introduces the following music video and future content release.
An animated music video portion of the song 'Muteki☆Honki da Survivor!' showing Lamy driving a convertible.
